overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring foggy, Victorian-era cobblestone streets at night. The character moves from an enclosed courtyard through narrow alleys and past parked carriages, eventually entering a gated mansion courtyard. The atmosphere is dark and moody with gas lamp lighting and dense fog.

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits enclosed courtyard onto foggy cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking through stone courtyard past iron fence and brazier fires, approaching and opening wooden door to exit

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the ceiling of the courtyard
thick stone support column with ornate capital
black iron fence with vertical bars blocking passage

heavy wooden door with metal studs leading to street
gas lamp post with warm yellow glow visible through doorway

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dark, enclosed stone courtyard with high arched ceilings and burning braziers. Walking past an iron fence, the character approaches a heavy wooden door at the far end. At 10 seconds, the door opens to reveal a foggy cobblestone street beyond, marking the transition from the sheltered interior to the exposed night.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone street with gas lamps and parked carriages

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street, passing parked carriages and illuminated street lamps

notable_agents.action: parked horse-drawn carriage with large wooden wheels on the street side

entered.detail: wooden horse-drawn carriage with large spoked wheels parked on the cobblestones
multi-story brick building with lit windows and wooden balconies

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone street illuminated by warm gas lamps. A parked horse-drawn carriage sits on the right side while brick townhouses with glowing windows line the left. The atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alleyway with overhead stone arch

events.description: character passes through stone archway entering narrow covered alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage between brick walls, passing under the stone archway

entered.detail: stone archway forming a tunnel-like passage between buildings
wooden cart or barricade blocking part of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick alleyway through a stone archway. The passage is tight with brick walls on both sides and a wooden barricade visible on the right. The lighting becomes dimmer and more enclosed as the character moves deeper into the alley toward a distant iron gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated mansion courtyard with dead trees

events.description: character passes under stone arch underpass into covered section
character opens iron gate and enters mansion courtyard

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the iron gate, opening it to enter the mansion courtyard

entered.detail: covered stone archway forming a tunnel passage
tall black iron gate with vertical bars blocking entrance to courtyard
large multi-story stone mansion with lit windows and wooden balconies
leafless tree with twisted branches in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a stone arch underpass and approaches a tall iron gate. After opening the gate at 50 seconds, the character enters a courtyard with a large mansion building ahead. Dead trees and scattered leaves cover the ground as the character moves toward the mansion entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered stone interior through a foggy urban labyrinth and into the desolate grounds of a grand estate. It begins in a dark, enclosed courtyard with high arched ceilings and burning braziers, moving past an iron fence toward a heavy wooden door. As the door opens, the scene expands into a foggy cobblestone street illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing a parked horse-drawn carriage and glowing brick townhouses. The camera then shifts into a narrow, dim brick alleyway through a stone archway, pressing deeper past a wooden barricade toward a distant iron gate. Finally, the path opens up after passing under a stone underpass and through the gate, revealing a mansion courtyard filled with dead trees and scattered leaves.
